title: Family searches living room — detective mode
prompt: @Sara KNEELS beside the couch, hands LIFTING a cushion. @Eva on the floor PEEKS under the coffee table, eyes scanning. @Mama BENDS at the floor lamp, hands MOVING aside the lamp base to look behind it. A determined brow furrows on the older girl. A small mouth OPENS calling out. The mother SHAKES her head no, gives a comic shrug. Warm morning daylight in living room. @Eva (calling): "Anything yet?"
